injuries.comment: The Red Wings Head Coach McLellan announced on Friday (Mar. 21) that Gustafsson will be out long-term and does not have a timetable to return.
The Red Wings listed Solderblom as Out for the Final three games of the regular season.
The Dallas Stars listed Harley as Out for Monday's (Apr. 14) game against the Red Wings.
The Dallas Stars announced Marchment is expected to remain sidelined for Monday's (Apr. 14) game against the Red Wings.
The Dallas Stars listed Lindell as Out for Monday's (Apr. 14) game against the Red Wings.
